command:
echo "=== .201 replica registered connections ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 jose@192.168.0.201 \
  "sudo journalctl -u cloudflared -n 20 --no-pager 2>/dev/null | grep -iE 'Registered tunnel connection|conn=' | tail -4"

echo ""
echo "=== Public URLs still responding (traffic flows through tunnel) ==="
for url in n8n.cutegrafiks.com hermes-api.cutegrafiks.com remy.cutegrafiks.com sakura.cutegrafiks.com bridge.cutegrafiks.com; do
  CODE=$(curl -sI -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" --max-time 10 https://$url 2>/dev/null)
  echo "  $url -> $CODE"
done

echo ""
echo "=== Both cloudflared instances active? ==="
echo -n ".191 cloudflared: "; systemctl is-active cloudflared
echo -n ".201 cloudflared: "; ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 jose@192.168.0.201 "systemctl is-active cloudflared"
